top_signals.title: Oil Steadies at End of Volatile Week as US and Iran Keep Talking
top_signals.summary: Oil steadied at the end of a bumpy week, as talks between the US and Iran continued despite a flare-up in fighting that drove a steep drop in traffic through the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: OpenAI exec Fidji Simo says she's stepping down due to chronic illness, will transition to advisor
top_signals.summary: Fidji Simo stepped away from OpenAI in April for a medical leave, says she now has to focus on recovery.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
